x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: An empty KEDB means Now Assist cannot surface known error workarounds as AI resolution suggestions -- one of the highest-value AI deflection capabilities is completely inactive.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Use the OOB "Create Known Error" UI action on resolved problems to link a Knowledge Base article. This populates the kb_knowledge field (Primary Known Error article). Do not rely on the legacy known_error boolean field — it is deprecated in modern ServiceNow instances and not used by Now Assist.
